headline: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

summary: A continuously refreshed editorial brief for buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents — covering ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Siri, Folk, Orchids, and why durable computer‑use agents with a reusable computer-use cache are emerging as the sharper path forward.
